msg: Bump version to 1.0.5
Rename binary from rdp-html5 to go-rdp throughout codebase
Improve CLI documentation consistency and thoroughness
Add audio quality preference: prioritize bandwidth over quality by default
Add AAC audio codec support for better bandwidth efficiency
Fix toast close button position: move to top-right
Fix 32-bit rendering: correct Planar vs RLE codec detection; fix audio sample rate
Bump version to 1.0.4
Fix audio: buffer accumulation, format index mapping, context resume
Fix 32-bit rendering: route surface commands by codec type, raise PDU size limit
Add VERSION file, fix audio scheduling and RFX multifragment size
Wire up RemoteFX-Image codec end-to-end
Fix cursor black square, simplify asset embedding, align error messages with CLI flags
Bump version to 1.0.3
fix: resolve all gosec findings and scope CI/CD cleanup actions
Bump version to 1.0.2
fix(rdp): spec-verified RDP compliance fixes
fix: address remaining lower-severity audit findings
fix: correct logic errors found during codebase audit
Bump version to 1.0.1
chore: add bump-patch and push release targets
chore: mandate TinyGo for WASM builds
ci: align build pipeline with guerite patterns
fix(audio): correct protocol serialization and WebSocket format negotiation
Add PWA manifest and icons
Fix audit issues and proxy CORS
docs: comprehensive documentation audit and updates
docs: update documentation for MP3 audio support
feat(audio): add MP3 audio format support for WebAudio
docs: Improve formatting and consistency in architecture documentation
